untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by custom momentum metric and selecting top/bottom deciles, which cannot be expressed as point-in-time indicator conditions. This is a cross-sectional ranking strategy that requires portfolio construction logic, not individual stock entry/exit rules. The backtest engine would need custom portfolio ranking and decile selection functionality.
translation_notes: Original signal is a decile-based momentum portfolio strategy with monthly rebalancing on India market (Jan 2011-Sep 2019). Entry conditions require ranking all stocks and selecting top 10% (long) and bottom 10% (short) by momentum. This cannot be translated to standard technical indicator rules. Suggested approach: implement custom ranking module in backtest engine or use external ranking system. Hold period is 1 month (~22 trading days).
